AlertCrewmanNeedsRescue.title: Crew member needs rescue
AlertCrewmanNeedsRescue.description:
One of your crew members needs to be rescued.

Ensure you have an empty bed for them to rest in and that the area is safe and contains oxygen.

If you have no materials, you can place a sleeping spot down for free.

AlertNeedCrewBeds.title: Your crew have no beds available
AlertNeedCrewBeds.description:
Your crew get much better sleep if they have a bed to sleep in. The better the bed, the less sleep they will need.

If you have no materials, you can place a sleeping spot down for free.

AlertNeedAirSource.title: Air source missing
AlertNeedAirSource.description:
You need an air source to fill your rooms with oxygen.

Each room with an atmosphere requires air supplied by some sort of air supply, through ducting, to an air ventilator.

Try building a Life Support to begin with, then connect that with Ducting to an Air Ventilator.

AlertNeedAirVent.title: An air supply has no air ventilator
AlertNeedAirVent.description:
You have an air supply turned on, but it cannot supply any air because there is no connected air ventilator.

Ensure you have built an air ventilator, and that the ventilator and air supply are either next to each other or connected via ducting.

AlertLowFood.title: Low food
AlertLowFood.description:
You are running extremely low on food.

Either grow, butcher, trade, or brew some food.

AlertLowDrink.title: Low drink
AlertLowDrink.description:
You are running extremely low on drinking fluids.

You can get more drinking fluids by melting ice in barrels or trading with passing ships.

AlertNoStockpile.title: No stockpile zone
AlertNoStockpile.description:
You have no stockpile zones, which means you cannot store any materials.

Use the top left menu to select a stockpile and place it inside your ship. Alternatively, you can place a temporary stockpile outside your ship.

AlertLowMood.title: Low mood
AlertLowMood.description:
One or more of your crew has a low mood.

Open the morale panel on the character menu and assess what moods needs rectifying.

AlertBreach.title: Ship breached!
AlertBreach.description:
One or more rooms on your ship has been breached. Any atmosphere in these rooms will now be venting into space!

Seal the breach with Ship Structure to limit any further atmospheric loss.

A lack of atmosphere can cause your crew to suffocate and any flora to die.

AlertIdleCrew.title: Idle crew
AlertIdleCrew.description:
All of your crew are idle and have nothing to do.

Open the crew menu to assign work orders and schedules.

If any of your crew have been commanded, they will not perform normal daily tasks.

AlertUrgentMedicalTreatment.title: Urgent medical treatment
AlertUrgentMedicalTreatment.description:
One or more of your crew members require urgent medical attention.

Make sure they are healed with a medical kit as soon as possible.

AlertBlackAlert.title: Black Alert Activated
AlertBlackAlert.description:
Your ship is in a state of black alert. This means your crew will not be able to exit the ship.

You can disable black alert on the ship systems menu.
